title: WorkItems Module — Scope Parameters
description: Parameters for the WorkItems module scope in a MigrationJobModule configuration. Place these under MigrationJobModule.Scopes[0].Parameters in the migration.json job file.

query.description: WIQL query to filter the work items to export. Must select only [System.Id]. If omitted, defaults to exporting all work items in the configured project.
query.default: SELECT [System.Id] FROM WorkItems WHERE [System.TeamProject] = @project ORDER BY [System.Id]
examples: SELECT [System.Id] FROM WorkItems WHERE [System.TeamProject] = @project AND [System.WorkItemType] = 'Bug' ORDER BY [System.Id]
SELECT [System.Id] FROM WorkItems WHERE [System.TeamProject] = @project AND [System.AreaPath] UNDER 'MyProject\Team A' ORDER BY [System.Id]

includeAttachments.description: Whether to download and store attachment binaries alongside each revision. When false, attachment metadata (originalName, sha256, size) is still recorded in revision.json but no binary files are written.
